blue_oceans.notes: 580K morning routine community. Apps are habit-stacker checklists or sleep trackers. Zero apps gamify the daily morning routine habit (each step earns XP, full routine = streak) with progression unlocks.

125K memory technique community. Lumosity/Anki are brain games or flashcards. Zero apps gamify the daily memory palace practice (one journey per day, one encoding drill, one recall test) with streak/XP.
520K time management community. Apps are planners or schedulers. Zero apps gamify the daily time-blocking practice habit (plan one day in blocks, stick to it, earn streak XP for adherence).

290K cat community. Apps are translators, games, or health tools. Zero apps gamify the daily cat enrichment habit (one puzzle, one clicker trick, one play session) with streak/XP for cat behavioral health.

1M aquarium/fishkeeping community. Apps are parameter loggers or reminder schedulers. Zero apps gamify the daily aquarium care habit (test water, dose ferts, check stock) with streak/XP for husbandry mastery.

1.85M chemistry community. Apps are reference tools or general learning platforms. Zero apps gamify the daily chemistry habit (one reaction mechanism, one stoichiometry drill, one concept card) with streak/XP.

2.3M physics community. Apps are reference tools, simulations, or general learning platforms. Zero apps gamify the daily physics habit (one free-body diagram, one energy conservation problem, one concept card) with streak/XP.

1.52M game dev community. Apps are engines, course platforms, or reference tools. Zero apps gamify the daily game dev habit (30 min code, one asset, one design decision) with streak/XP for consistent indie dev discipline.

3.2M esports community. Apps are stats trackers or game-specific analytics. Zero apps gamify the daily esports analysis habit (review one VOD clip, identify one mistake, study one pro play) with cross-game streak/XP.

1.13M speedrunning community. Apps are timers, leaderboards, or casual racing games. Zero apps gamify the daily speedrunning practice habit (one movement tech drill, one route study, one attempt) with streak/XP.

occupied.notes: 280K public speaking community. Speeko and Orai both have streak features. Space has real competitors — SOFT_COMPETITION not blue ocean. Multiple paid apps with daily streak systems exist.
1.44M dog training community. Dogo has full gamified streak system. Woofz also has streaks. Multiple paid streak apps exist — SOFT_COMPETITION. Still viable but crowded at the streak mechanic level.

1.28M biology community. Quizlet has daily study streaks (covers biology). Complete Anatomy has progress tracking. Space is adjacent — SOFT_COMPETITION. A biology-specific streak app would differentiate.
2.32M statistics community. Brilliant (4.8, 245K) has a dedicated daily streak for statistics/probability with XP and course progression. OCCUPIED — strong paid competitor with exact mechanic.

500K FPS aim training community. AimLab has mobile app with daily tracking. Aiming Pro and FPS Training both have partial streak features. SOFT_COMPETITION — niche has mobile presence with streak-adjacent mechanics.
